description: Looking to open up my space to 2 like minded stylists! Seventh House is full of natural light, happy plants, and good energy, and I’m ready to share that with stylists who value these qualities, but also teamwork, community, and creativity. Email Link in Bio! Ask me anything. Looking forward to meeting you ✨

layoutDescription: Diagonal or angled section dividers (clip-path or skewed bands); hero with angled color block behind headline; dynamic but not chaotic.
antiPatterns: No food menu language. Gallery should showcase work, not template beauty shots.
photoInventory: You will receive 9 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
